subject: Mandatory team-building Friday
body:
Hi all,

Reminder that Friday is the quarterly team-building. We'll be doing an escape room simulation in the break room.

Attendance is strongly encouraged (mandatory). Please RSVP by Wednesday.

— Sharon

subject: RE: printer is making the noise again
body:
Have you tried turning it off and on again?

Seriously though, I'll swing by after lunch. Don't touch it.

-K

subject: URGENT: 15,000,000 USD awaiting your assistance
body:
Dearest beloved one,

I am writing to you from a palace in grave circumstance. My late uncle, His Royal Highness, has bequeathed to his most trusted friend (you) the sum of FIFTEEN MILLION UNITED STATES DOLLARS.

To release these funds I require only a modest wire transfer of 2,500 USD for legal notarizing.

Reply with your bank routing details at once.

Yours in everlasting gratitude,
Prince Obah

subject: Quick sync?
body:
Got 15 min? Just want to catch up on the thing.

Thanks,
Dave

subject: You have 3 meetings today
body:
Your schedule for today:

- 10:00  Standup
- 14:00  Sync with Dave
- 16:00  'Optional' all-hands

Have a productive day!

subject: Lunch order — last call
body:
If you want in on the group sandwich order, text me by 11:30 with what you want.

No tuna this time please. You know why.

subject: Your weekly horoscope ★
body: This week you will do a thing. The thing may or may not go well. Mercury is in something. Lucky color: taupe.

subject: Statement ready
body: Your monthly statement is ready to view. Log in securely to see how much of it went to coffee.

subject: RE: Quick sync?
body:
Sure, I'm free after 2. Hop in the meeting room or just shout.

— me

subject: printer is making the noise again
body: It's doing the thing. You know the thing. Please help.

subject: (draft) Apology re: incident
body:
Hi team,

Regarding last Friday's events in the kitchen, I want to be clear about a few things:

1. It wasn't me.
2. I was in another building.
3. Even if it was me, the microwave was already broken.

Regards,
